Lay down the previous mixture for a large bowl, add the cod, the straw potato and a little chopped coriander and wrap it very well. eggless-vanilla-ice-cream-argiro.name: Eggless Vanilla Ice Cream
instructions: We four the vanilla in half.
In a pot, heat the milk and add the vanilla, sugar and a pinch of salt.
Allow the milk to heat and melt the sugar.
Mix with wire.
Transfer the mixture into a bowl or jug and add the cream.
Mix and let it cool on the kitchen counter.

Beat the mixture into the mixer or place the mixture in an ice cream machine, following the instructions of the ice cream machine.
Pour the mixture into a shadow and wide bowl and freeze in the freezer until it thinks slightly.

eggplant-sandwiches.name: Eggplant Sandwiches
instructions: Preheat your oven's broiler. Brush eggplant slices with olive oil, and place them on a baking sheet or broiling pan. Place the pan about 6 inches from the heat source. Cook under the broiler for 10 minutes, or until tender and toasted.

Split the French rolls lengthwise, and toast. Stir mayonnaise and garlic together in a cup or small bowl; spread on the toasted bread. Fill rolls with eggplant slices, tomato, feta cheese and basil leaves.
